hooks.command: echo "📊 知识库快照" && echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" && for dir in 00Inbox 05Temp 10Learning 20Notes; do echo "$dir: $(ls -1 /e/000个人知识库/$dir/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l) 篇"; done && echo "30Outputs: $(find /e/000个人知识库/30Outputs -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | wc -l) 篇" && echo "" && echo "📝 正在学习:" && for f in $(grep -rl '#进行中' /e/000个人知识库/ --include="*.md" 2>/dev/null | grep -v CLAUDE.md | head -5); do echo "  - $(basename "$f" .md)"; done && echo "" && echo "⚠️ 以上仅为状态提醒，请勿主动读取或处理，等待用户指示"
cd /e/000个人知识库 && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "📦 自动同步" && git push)
